themes.label: Brokerage Charges
themes.description: Users are unhappy with the high brokerage charges levied by the app.
representativeQuotes: Ya app bahut jada brokerage charges lata ha.
high brokerage fees....more than half the profit we make...ridiculous
DP charges are high and For investors - brokerage on equity delivery!!
themes.actionInsight: The product team should review and optimize the brokerage charge structure to make it more competitive and transparent.

themes.label: App Stability
themes.description: Users are experiencing issues with the app's stability, including crashes, lags, and failed transactions.
representativeQuotes: This app have high charges and when you try to talk to agent you will get no response . sometimes it hangs while placing order.
Last few months this app is unusable. every time page fail to load page fail to load even when there is good internet connection.
The app experienced a severe technical glitch during live trading, and customer support’s resolution process is completely unacceptable.
themes.actionInsight: The product team should prioritize fixing the app's stability issues to prevent losses and improve user experience.

themes.label: Customer Support
themes.description: Users are dissatisfied with the customer support provided by the app, citing unresponsive agents and poor issue resolution.
representativeQuotes: This app have high charges and when you try to talk to agent you will get no response .
I am using groww from 2021 onwards but this month my SIP is not deducted and your coustomer service is very poor
themes.actionInsight: The product team should enhance the customer support experience by providing responsive and helpful agents to address user concerns.

themes.label: Feature Requests
themes.description: Users are requesting new features, such as international market access, stop-loss, and trailing stop-loss, to improve their investment experience.
representativeQuotes: Groww Must add International Market also I request you to allow investing in international Market also
good application but fund comparison is the worst one. please add something like overlap % companies, last 5yr return reason etc if possible.
I would love to see Goww introduce an Affordable FnO feature that allows users to trade with lower capital requirements.
themes.actionInsight: The product team should consider implementing user-requested features to enhance the app's functionality and competitiveness.

themes.label: User Experience
themes.description: Users are praising the app's user-friendly interface and ease of use, making it accessible to beginners and experienced investors alike.
representativeQuotes: This app is nice investing in stocks, bonds mutual funds and other investment avenues. The facilities are convenient and user friendly.
very user friendly & gives all informative technical data to analyze investments
I have had a very good experience using Groww. The app is simple, user-friendly, and makes investing in stocks, mutual funds, and other financial products easy, even for beginners.
themes.actionInsight: The product team should continue to refine and improve the user experience to maintain a competitive edge and high user satisfaction.
